heroTextNews: Explore the latest stories from WAE. From product innovations and sustainability initiatives to industry insights, partnerships, and company milestones, browse through the updates below to discover what's shaping our journey and the future of water.
heroTextAwards: Every recognition tells a story of innovation, purpose, and progress. Explore the awards and honours that celebrate our commitment to engineering excellence, sustainable impact, thoughtful design, and redefining the future of water through meaningful innovation.

items.title: WAE Felicitated with 15th CII Design Excellence Award 2025 for Communication Design
items.description: New Delhi, December 03, 2025: WAE, India’s leading water solutions provider, has been conferred the prestigious 15th CII Design Excellence Award 2025, securing a place among India’s Top 50 Designs  in the communication design category.

items.title: WAE Achieves Prestigious ZED Gold Certification
items.description: WAE, India’s leading sustainable water solutions company, has been awarded the ZED Gold Certification by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME), Government of India

items.title: WAE Earns EcoVadis “Committed” Badge, Launching a Structured Journey Towards Platinum Sustainability Certification
items.description: WAE, India’s leading sustainable hydration solutions provider for institutional and commercial environments, today announced that it has been awarded the EcoVadis “Committed” Badge, a globally recognized sustainability acknowledgment by EcoVadis.

items.title: WAE Drinking Water Coolers Certified by BIS Under IS 1475:2024
items.description: WAE, an Indian manufacturer of drinking water and water management systems for institutional and commercial use, has received certification from the Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS) for its full range of drinking water coolers

items.title: How Industrial Equipment Is Being Designed to Deliver Measurable Carbon Reductions
items.description: For over a century, industrial machinery has been engineered to convert energy into output which is faster, cheaper, and at scale. Carbon, if acknowledged at all, was incidental.

items.title: Safari India Exclusive: Binita Singh of WAE F&B on Redefining Sustainable Water Solutions in Hospitality
items.description: She discusses the growing shift towards circular water systems, the challenges associated with single-use plastics, and how technology-driven solutions are helping hotels reduce costs,

items.title: Alignment with SDG 6: How Companies Can Make a Measurable Difference in Water Security
items.description: Water is rapidly emerging as a critical concern that affects economies, communities, and businesses alike. Growing demand, declining quality, and climate pressures are putting immense strain on available water resources.

items.title: Net Zero will not be achieved without manufacturing innovation
items.description: Net zero depends on transforming manufacturing through process, product, and digital innovation to cut emissions across steel, cement, chemicals, and industry.

items.title: How Indian Hotels Are Increasingly Breaking Up with Plastic
items.description: Discover how Indian hotels are transforming their approach to sustainability by replacing single-use plastics with on-site water purification and glass bottling.

items.title: Sustainable Workplaces: How Large Institutions Can Cut Plastic Waste and Emissions
items.description: For large institutions, water is no longer a utilities issue. It is a systems issue spanning procurement, public health, carbon accounting, material throughput, and operational resilience.
